intro: Erysimum flavescens, also known as Yellow Wallflower, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Erysimum flavescens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
